title: Resolve a grievance from the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can open a grievance, update its status to resolved, and see the list refresh to reflect the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open a grievance from the table
Update the grievance status to resolved
Verify a resolved confirmation is visible
Verify the grievance list reflects the updated status

title: View admin grievance workload summary
description: This verifies that an admin can open the dashboard and see the overall grievance workload summary displayed correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify the dashboard summary metrics are displayed
Verify total, pending, and resolved grievance counts are displayed

title: Load the admin grievance dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can open the dashboard and see the summary metrics and grievance list needed to manage cases.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify summary metrics are displayed
Verify the grievance table is displayed

title: Review all grievances in the admin queue
description: An admin can open the dashboard and see the summary metrics and full grievance table needed to review the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify summary metrics are displayed
Verify the grievance table is displayed

title: View assigned grievances in the department portal
description: This verifies that department staff can open the department portal and see assigned grievances ready for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Verify assigned grievances are displayed
Verify the queue shows at least one grievance item or an empty state message

title: Review the full admin grievance table
description: This verifies that an admin can open the dashboard and see the full grievance list for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify the grievance table is displayed
Verify grievance records are listed

title: Resolve an assigned grievance from the admin list
description: This verifies that an admin can change a grievance status to resolved and see the updated result reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open a grievance's status controls
Select resolved status
Verify the grievance status is shown as resolved in the list

title: Refresh the admin queue after resolving a grievance
description: An admin can update a grievance to resolved and see the queue refresh with the updated status reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open the details for a grievance row
Update the grievance status to resolved
Verify the grievance list reflects the updated resolved status

title: Submit a remark on a grievance
description: This verifies that department staff can enter a remark on an open grievance and successfully submit the update.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open a grievance from the assigned queue
Enter a valid remark into the remark field
Submit the remark
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the grievance update is reflected in the portal

title: Load the department grievance queue
description: This verifies that department staff can open their portal and see the grievances assigned to their department.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Verify the department grievance queue is displayed
Verify assigned grievances are displayed

title: Open a grievance for review
description: This verifies that department staff can open a grievance from the queue and view its details for follow-up.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open a grievance from the assigned queue
Verify grievance details are displayed
Verify the selected grievance remains in a reviewable state

title: Review assigned grievances in the department portal
description: Department staff can open the department portal and see the grievances assigned to their department.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Verify assigned grievances are displayed
Verify the department queue is visible

title: Add a remark to a department grievance
description: Department staff can open an assigned grievance, submit a remark, and see the updated item remain in the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open an assigned grievance
Add a remark to the grievance
Submit the update
Verify the updated grievance remains visible in the department queue

title: Filter grievances by status
description: An admin can narrow the grievance list by status and see only grievances in that status.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Select a status filter value
Verify the grievance list updates to matching records

title: Search for a grievance from the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can enter a keyword and see the grievance list narrow to matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill in the grievance search field with a keyword
Verify the grievance list updates to matching results

title: Filter grievances by category
description: An admin can narrow the grievance list to a selected category and see only matching records.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Select a category filter value
Verify the grievance list updates to matching records

title: Review and add a remark to an assigned grievance
description: This verifies that department staff can open an assigned grievance, add a remark, and submit the update successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open an assigned grievance
Open the remark input area
Enter a remark
Submit the remark update
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated grievance remains visible in the queue

title: Open a grievance detail from the admin list
description: This verifies that an admin can open a grievance from the table and view its full details.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open a grievance from the table
Verify the grievance detail view is displayed
Verify the selected grievance details are displayed

title: Find a grievance using search and filters
description: This verifies that an admin can narrow the grievance table with search and filters and inspect the matching result set.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Enter a grievance keyword into the search field
Apply a category filter
Apply a status filter
Verify the grievance table shows the filtered matching results

title: Open grievance details from the admin table
description: An admin can open a grievance detail view and inspect the full record for a selected grievance.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open the details for a grievance row
Verify a grievance detail view is displayed

title: Send a broadcast notification from the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can compose a broadcast message and send it successfully from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open the broadcast message area
Enter a broadcast message
Send the broadcast
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the broadcast message area is available for another message

title: Find a grievance after combining search and filters
description: This verifies that an admin can combine search and filters to isolate a specific grievance record in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill in the grievance search field with a keyword
Select a grievance category filter
Select a grievance status filter
Verify the grievance list is narrowed to matching records
Verify the filtered grievance results are displayed

title: Combine search and filters to isolate a grievance
description: An admin can use search, category, and status together to isolate a specific grievance before reviewing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Enter a grievance search term
Select a category filter value
Select a status filter value
Verify the grievance list is narrowed to the matching record

title: Open a grievance detail from the admin table
description: This verifies that an admin can open a grievance from the table and view its detailed information before taking action.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open a grievance from the table
Verify grievance details are displayed
Verify the selected grievance remains identifiable in the detail view

title: Send a broadcast notification to students
description: This verifies that an admin can compose and send a broadcast message and receive confirmation that it was submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill in the broadcast message field with a message for students
Submit the broadcast notification
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the broadcast notification is recorded in the admin view

title: Keep a followed-up grievance visible after remark submission
description: This verifies that after department staff add a remark, the grievance still appears in the queue with the update reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open an assigned grievance
Enter a remark
Submit the remark update
Verify the grievance remains visible in the department queue
Verify the remark update is reflected on the grievance

title: Keep a remarked grievance visible in the queue
description: This verifies that after submitting a remark, the updated grievance remains visible in the department queue for follow-up.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open a grievance from the assigned queue
Enter a valid remark into the remark field
Submit the remark
Verify the updated grievance is still visible in the queue
Verify the remark update is reflected for the grievance

title: Keep a resolved grievance visible after updating it
description: This verifies that after an admin resolves a grievance, the updated record remains available in the refreshed list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open a grievance's status controls
Select resolved status
Verify the updated grievance remains visible in the list
Verify the status is shown as resolved

title: Handle a long remark before submission
description: This verifies that department staff can enter a long remark and still submit the update successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open a grievance from the assigned queue
Enter a long valid remark into the remark field
Submit the remark
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the grievance update is reflected in the portal

title: Handle an empty admin search result
description: An admin can search for a non-matching grievance and see an empty result state instead of stale rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Enter a search term that does not match any grievance
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no grievance rows are displayed

title: Prevent submitting an empty remark
description: This verifies that department staff cannot submit a grievance update without entering remark text and that validation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Open a grievance from the assigned queue
Submit the remark without entering text
Verify a remark validation error is visible
Verify the remark is not submitted

title: Reject an empty broadcast submission
description: This verifies that an admin cannot send a broadcast without entering a message and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Open the broadcast message area
Send the broadcast without entering a message
Verify a broadcast validation error is visible
Verify the message is not sent

title: Review a grievance when the department queue is empty
description: This verifies that department staff see an empty state when there are no assigned grievances to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no grievance items are displayed

title: View an empty department queue state
description: This verifies that the department portal shows an empty state when there are no assigned grievances to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /department
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no assigned grievances are displayed
